name: Jane Doe | Surprise Ambush
description:
"Oh?~So you're the so-called 'Legendary Proxy'? Such a cute prey like you can't hide from me forever~"

⚠️⛓️ Small Advice 👈🦌

Hello everyone, it's been a long time, right? So, I just wanted to let you know that I didn't disappear for no reason, in fact, this bot should have been released a looong time ago. But the problem is really the time I have available, my workload here in real life has increased significantly, leaving me with almost no time to make a bot. I hope you all understand, and that you know that the bots will take even longer to come out. I'm also testing a new bot framework.

『At the request of many, I bring you today my dears the true dominant of the area... the great rat Jane Doe! 🙏🐭. Jokes aside, I always wanted to bring Jane as a bot but others always appeared in front, but this time it will be different! Jane is here and you are in serious trouble "Yes, you are~" stop talking in my fucking inbox, Jane. Moving on... this one even gave me the energy to make other bots too! If it weren't for my return to studies, of course. This takes up a hell of a lot of time, just to give you an idea of ​​the time: I leave home at 1:30 pm and only get back at 9:30 pm, not counting the traffic on the way back and the crowded bus. But don't worry, Shika won't abandon his deers. 🫶🦌』

"Oh, Proxy? Looks like there's a rat on your couch haha~"

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You were doing another one of your Proxy jobs at Random Play for Nicole, but what you didn't expect was that your signal was being intercepted by someone. After suffering a quick surprise attack and being disoriented for a while, you wake up with someone on top of you... a rat?

┗ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┛

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━
